description: Add dice/cowrie shell rolling animations with sound effects to the DiceWidget. Convert from StatelessWidget to StatefulWidget with AnimationControllers, add visual feedback (glow, bounce, spin), and integrate audioplayers for sound effects.
steps: Add audioplayers dependency to pubspec.yaml and create assets/sounds/ directory with WAV files
Create SoundService singleton for managing game audio playback
Add isAnimating flag to GameProvider to prevent interactions during animation
Convert DiceWidget to StatefulWidget with TickerProviderStateMixin and AnimationControllers
Implement cowrie shell flip animation with staggered timing and perspective transforms
Implement dice spin animation with random face cycling and bounce effect
Add golden glow reveal effect and bonus turn scale-pop animation
Update GameScreen to pass animation callbacks to DiceWidget
Update game_screen_test to handle animation timing
Verify all 152 tests pass and flutter analyze is clean
acceptance_criteria: Cowrie shells animate flipping/rotating for ~1.2 seconds before showing final result
Each shell flips independently with staggered timing offsets
Dice spins/rotates with random face cycling for ~1.2 seconds
Golden glow highlight on result reveal
Bonus turn text animates in with scale pop
Sound effects play for roll, reveal, and bonus events
GameProvider.isAnimating prevents board interactions during animation
All existing tests continue to pass
verification: Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma && flutter analyze
Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma && flutter test
findings: Used TickerProviderStateMixin for multiple AnimationControllers. Shell controllers use .repeat(reverse: true) during animation and are stopped on roll completion. The setTranslationRaw method was used instead of deprecated translate. pumpAndSettle cannot be used in tests with repeating animations - must use explicit pump(Duration) calls to advance through animation timeline. audioplayers 6.8.1 resolved successfully.
